events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, born in Hampton, Middlesex, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring his unmistakable guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, born in Dartford, Kent, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still got the moves, still got the voice. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed how we consumed music forever. What was the first music video that truly blew you away?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which was officially released on August 29, 1994, is celebrated today, marking 32 years since its groundbreaking arrival.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' on the world. A true Britpop game-changer. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on this day in 1977.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, the music world lost a true legend. Remembering Elvis Presley and his incredible, enduring legacy.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost one of music's greatest innovators. His influence lives on.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, which was first released in the UK on September 26, 1969, is celebrated today.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: That legendary zebra crossing photo and an album full of classics. Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' today.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Chick Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true icon of rock and roll. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis' charismatic frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975, marking 51 years today.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A song that still resonates globally for peace and unity.

events.title: The first iPod anniversary
events.blurb: Apple first introduced the original iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the iPod first came out? It changed everything. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic 007 film franchise which began with 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to rewatch your favourite 007 adventure. What's your go-to Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite moment from his incredible career?
